title: AtHome Method, Spel Class
description: Returns True if the current robot is at the home position.
see_also:
Home

AtHome Example

VB Example:

If m_spel.AtHome() Then

  lblCurPos.Text = "Robot is at home position"

Else

  lblCurPos.Text = "Robot is not at home position"

End If

C# Example:

if(m_spel.AtHome())

   lblCurPos.Text = "Robot is at home position";

else

   lblCurPos.Text = "Robot is not at home position";
examples:
If m_spel.AtHome() Then lblCurPos.Text = "Robot is at home position"
Else lblCurPos.Text = "Robot is not at home position"
End If
